PreToolUse.bash: command -v sage >/dev/null 2>&1 && sage security scan-hook || true

SessionStart.bash: command -v sage >/dev/null 2>&1 && sage skill context --format copilot 2>/dev/null || true

Stop.bash: command -v sage >/dev/null 2>&1 && sage capture hook response 2>/dev/null || true

UserPromptSubmit.bash: command -v sage >/dev/null 2>&1 && sage suggest hook skill --limit 3 --provision 2>/dev/null || true
command -v sage >/dev/null 2>&1 && sage capture hook prompt 2>/dev/null || true
